full_content:
Bridge dispatch prompts must defer to the durable role record, not assert role inline

Per owner directive 2026-04-29 (S321): '(b) the dispatch prompt ALWAYS defers to the durable record by saying "Read your durable role from .claude/rules/operating-role.md".'

RATIONALE: spawned harnesses (claude -p, codex exec) receive role assignment via the dispatch prompt's text. If that text hard-codes the role ('You are Prime Builder' / 'You are Codex Loyal Opposition'), it bypasses the durable role record at `.claude/rules/operating-role.md` and `harness-state/{harness}/operating-role.md`. The bypass works correctly in default operation (recipient-to-role mapping matches durable record) but creates a real divergence when the owner toggles the durable record (e.g., for a role-swap session). The spawned harness would receive a prompt-asserted role contradicting its own SessionStart-hook-loaded role, creating ambiguity.

INVARIANT: the dispatch prompt crafted by the bridge dispatch mechanism MUST instruct the spawned harness to read its role from the durable record. The prompt text MUST NOT hard-code the role assignment.

CURRENT IMPLEMENTATION (post-Slice-4): `_dispatch_prompt()` in `scripts/cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py` (the cross-harness event-driven trigger). The retired smart poller's equivalent (`groundtruth-kb/scripts/bridge_poller_runner.py::_dispatch_prompt`, archived 2026-05-09) emitted the same prompt text; the trigger preserves this contract byte-identically.

EXAMPLE PROMPT TEXT (current):
  'Read your durable role from `.claude/rules/operating-role.md` (or the harness-local override at `harness-state/{harness}/operating-role.md` if present, which takes precedence per `.claude/rules/operating-role.md`). Process the bridge entries selected below according to your declared role.'

MECHANICAL ENFORCEMENT: a behavioral test verifies the dispatch-prompt output contains the durable-record reference and does NOT contain hard-coded role assertions for both PRIME and CODEX recipients.

SUPERSEDES: v1 (2026-04-29) named the constraint binding to `groundtruth-kb/scripts/bridge_poller_runner.py::_dispatch_prompt`. v2 (2026-05-09) generalizes to the bridge dispatch mechanism abstractly; the current implementation lives at `scripts/cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py::_dispatch_prompt` and the smart-poller runner has been archived.

[
  {
    "id": "DCL-SPAWNED-HARNESS-ROLE-DEFER-DURABLE-RECORD-001.A1",
    "kind": "behavioral",
    "description": "Bridge dispatch mechanism's _dispatch_prompt(recipient, items, max_items) output text MUST contain '.claude/rules/operating-role.md' OR equivalent durable-record reference. Output MUST NOT contain literal 'You are Prime Builder' or 'You are Codex Loyal Opposition' as standalone role assertions. Applies to both PRIME and CODEX recipients.",
    "verifying_test": "tests/scripts/test_cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py (durable-role-deferral assertion deferred to a future slice; current cross-harness-trigger _dispatch_prompt source at scripts/cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py:216-244 contains the durable-record reference and is mechanism-correct by inspection)"
  }
]
explicit_change_request: Approve as drafted (D5c item 3 AskUserQuestion answer 2026-05-09): user selected 'Approve as drafted' for v2 of DCL-SPAWNED-HARNESS-ROLE-DEFER-DURABLE-RECORD-001. Title generalized; description rewritten as mechanism-agnostic with current-implementation pointer to the cross-harness trigger; assertion verifying-test deferred (matches v1 pattern).
change_reason: Slice 4 D5c item 3 (v2 supersession): mechanism-agnostic dispatch-prompt durable-role-deferral constraint. Authority: bridge gtkb-bridge-poller-event-driven-replacement-slice-4-smart-poller-retirement-001 GO at -016.
